reviews.comment:
Para recomendar. Atención+servicio y mercadería

(Translated by Google)
Highly recommended. Attention, service, and merchandise.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNSLTdmdlF3EAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención a pesar de que dejaron un solo playero un Domingo final de semana Santa, no muy acertado lo del encargado, a pesar de eso el muchacho atendió muy bien a todo el mundo.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service despite having only one beach attendant on the final Sunday of Holy Week; the manager's decision wasn't very accurate, but the young man treated everyone very well.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNSeTZ1a0l3EAE

reviews.comment:
Que más un servicio y limpieza en los baños  espectacularrrrrrrr

(Translated by Google)
What more could you ask for, spectacular service and cleanliness in the bathrooms!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNSMDczLWhBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención, las hamburguesas medio pelo. pensé que estaban estandarizadas ya que en otras estaciones de YPF se parecen bastantes

(Translated by Google)
Very good service, the hamburgers were just okay. I thought they were standardized since they're quite similar at other YPF stations.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNSZ19YQ1pBEAE

reviews.comment:
Fueron paradas rápidas para usar el sanitario.

(Translated by Google)
They were quick stops to use the restroom.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNSM1lDRzNRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Garayalde es para el sureño. El Oasis de la Patagonia. Hay llegas con miedos, incertidumbre, necesidades y generalmente salis a destinos. Cuidemos de que nunca falte.

(Translated by Google)
Garayalde is for the southerner. The oasis of Patagonia. You arrive there with fears, uncertainty, needs, and generally leave for other destinations. Let's make sure it never runs out.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNSZ2FiRU9nEAE

reviews.comment:
Una vergüenza! No te dejan acceder a las duchas si no cargas combustible. Un poco de empatia por todos los camioneros que viajan todo el día y lo único q desean es darse un buen baño. Deja muchísimo que desear esta estación de servicio.

(Translated by Google)
It's a disgrace! They won't let you use the showers unless you buy fuel. Have some empathy for all the truckers who travel all day and just want to take a nice shower. This gas station leaves a lot to be desired.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNSdnFqZVl3EAE

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) Very bad, they only provided showers for trucks carrying diesel. We wanted to pay for showers and nothing. Very inhumane treatment by the manager and supervisors.

(Original)
Muito ruim, só liberaram as duchas para os camiões que cargam gasoil. Quisimos pagar por duchas e nada. Um trato Muito deshumano pelo gerente e supervisores.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNSanVIX2hRRRAB
